add-ons.name: Browser Automation
add-ons.description: Stealth browser automation — navigate, fill forms, take screenshots, extract content via Chrome DevTools Protocol with VNC viewing
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: 11 MCP tools for browser automation. Runs headless Chrome in Docker with Xvfb + VNC. Human-like typing and clicking for stealth. CDP and VNC bind to localhost only — access via SSH tunnel from other machines.

add-ons.name: AI Companion
add-ons.description: Voice-interactive AI companion with animated Live2D avatar, powered by Open-LLM-VTuber with Crow BYOAI
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: COMPANION_PERSONA
env_vars.default: You are Crow, an AI companion. Helpful, curious, dry wit. Keep responses concise for speech.

add-ons.notes: Uses Crow AI Profiles for LLM inference. Voice recognition runs locally. TTS uses Edge TTS (free). Requires Tailscale HTTPS for microphone access.

add-ons.name: TURN Server (coturn)
add-ons.description: Self-hosted TURN relay for WebRTC voice chat. Enables NAT traversal for remote companion access when STUN alone is not sufficient.
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: TURN_SECRET
env_vars.description: Shared secret for generating time-limited TURN credentials

env_vars.name: TURN_EXTERNAL_IP
env_vars.description: Public IP of this machine (required for remote access, leave empty for LAN-only)

add-ons.notes: Optional for Tailscale-only deployments (STUN is sufficient). Required when users connect from restrictive networks. The companion gateway generates time-limited credentials via /api/turn-credentials.

add-ons.name: CrowClaw
add-ons.description: Create, configure, deploy, and monitor OpenClaw bots through MCP tools
add-ons.author: Crow

add-ons.name: Data Dashboard
add-ons.description: Explore SQLite databases, run queries, build charts, create case studies, and publish to your blog
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: 10 MCP tools for data exploration. Includes SQL editor, schema explorer, and case study publishing. Works with any SQLite database registered as a project backend.

add-ons.name: Home Assistant
add-ons.description: Control your smart home through Home Assistant — lights, temperature, switches, and more
add-ons.author: Crow

add-ons.name: Immich Photos
add-ons.description: Search photos, browse albums, and manage your Immich photo library
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: IMMICH_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Immich API key (from Immich admin panel)

add-ons.notes: Connects to an existing Immich instance. Limited ARM64 support.

add-ons.name: IPTV
add-ons.description: IPTV channel management — M3U playlists, EPG program guide, channel groups, and favorites
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Lightweight IPTV manager — no Docker required. Add M3U playlists via AI or the panel. EPG data parsed from XMLTV sources.

add-ons.name: Jellyfin
add-ons.description: Self-hosted media server — stream movies, TV shows, and music with AI-powered library management
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: JELLYFIN_MEDIA_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path for media files (Docker mode)

add-ons.notes: Self-host via Docker (set JELLYFIN_MEDIA_PATH) or connect to existing (set JELLYFIN_URL + JELLYFIN_API_KEY). 7 MCP tools for library search, browsing, and playback control.

add-ons.name: Knowledge Base
add-ons.description: Multilingual knowledge base — create, manage, and share organized collections of guides and articles with structured resource tracking, verification workflows, and LAN discovery
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: General-purpose knowledge base with multilingual support, LAN discovery (mDNS), WCAG 2.1 AA-compliant public pages, and AI-assisted content verification. No Docker required. 10 MCP tools.

add-ons.name: Kodi
add-ons.description: Remote control for Kodi — browse library, control playback, queue media via JSON-RPC
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Connects to existing Kodi instance. Enable HTTP remote control in Kodi Settings > Services > Web server.

add-ons.name: llama.cpp Qwen2.5-72B Q4_K_M (ROCm gfx1151, tiered Mode B)
add-ons.description: Top-tier reasoning (Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct Q4_K_M via llama.cpp-ROCm). Replaces vLLM Kimi slot (custom attention segfaults on gfx1151). 64K context, -fa 1 + --no-mmap per kyuz0/amd-strix-halo-toolboxes.
add-ons.author: Crow

add-ons.name: llama.cpp GLM-4.5-Air Q5_K_M (MoE 106B/12B)
add-ons.description: On-demand deep-reasoning MoE (~72GB). 12B active params for 70B-class quality. Shares :8003 with coder; conflicts with crow-chat (requires :8002 unload).
add-ons.author: Crow

providers.description: Deep-reasoning specialist (GLM-4.5-Air Q5_K_M, on-demand; conflicts with crow-chat)

add-ons.notes: On-demand. First start downloads ~72GB from HF. Cannot coexist with :8002 (orchestrator unloads crow-chat automatically before warming).

add-ons.name: llama.cpp Coder (Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B Q8_0)
add-ons.description: On-demand code specialist MoE (~30GB). Runs on Strix Halo gfx1151 via kyuz0 llama.cpp image. Shares :8003 with GLM-4.5-Air.
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: On-demand. First start downloads ~30GB from HF. Shares :8003 with GLM-4.5-Air via mutex.

add-ons.name: llama.cpp Qwen3.6-35B-A3B UD-Q6_K + Vision (Agentic MoE+VLM)
add-ons.description: On-demand agentic-coding + vision-language MoE (~30GB: 29GB model + 900MB mmproj-F16). 35B total / 3B active. Apr 2026 release. Joins :8003 swap group with coder + GLM.
add-ons.author: Crow

providers.description: Agentic-coding + VLM specialist (Qwen3.6-35B-A3B UD-Q6_K + mmproj-F16, on-demand)

add-ons.notes: On-demand. First start requires ~30GB pre-download (unsloth UD-Q6_K + mmproj-F16). Shares :8003 with coder + GLM via mutex — only one runs at a time. Vision: pass image_url or base64 data URL in chat completions.

add-ons.name: LocalAI
add-ons.description: OpenAI-compatible local AI server — chat, embeddings, and TTS without a cloud API
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: OpenAI-compatible API. Set AI_PROVIDER=openai and AI_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8080/v1 to use with Crow AI Chat.

add-ons.name: Media Hub
add-ons.description: News aggregation, RSS feeds, YouTube channels, podcasts, TTS audio, briefings, playlists, smart folders, email digests
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: 16 MCP tools for news and media management. No external services required. AI analysis uses your configured AI provider. TTS requires edge-tts (npm install edge-tts). Email digests require SMTP + nodemailer.

add-ons.name: File Storage (MinIO)
add-ons.description: S3-compatible file storage — upload, organize, and share files through Crow
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD
env_vars.description: MinIO admin password (choose a strong password)

add-ons.notes: After installation, Crow's storage tools (upload, list, delete files) are available automatically. MinIO console at http://localhost:9001.

add-ons.name: Nextcloud
add-ons.description: Access Nextcloud files via WebDAV mount — sync documents, browse folders
add-ons.author: Crow

add-ons.name: Nominatim GIS
add-ons.description: Self-hosted geocoding and GIS — forward/reverse geocode, batch geocode data columns, generate GeoJSON, map visualizations
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Requires ~30GB disk (US extract) and 4GB+ RAM. Initial import takes hours. Depends on Data Dashboard for full integration.

add-ons.name: Obsidian Vault
add-ons.description: Connect your Obsidian vault to Crow for reading, searching, and syncing notes
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH
env_vars.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault directory

add-ons.name: Ollama (Local AI)
add-ons.description: Run local AI models for embeddings, summarization, and content classification
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: RAM and disk depend on model size. Small models need ~2GB, large models need 8GB+.

add-ons.name: Plex
add-ons.description: Connect your Plex Media Server — browse library, control playback, manage playlists via AI
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Connects to existing Plex instance. Get token from browser dev tools on app.plex.tv. Some features require Plex Pass.

add-ons.name: Podcasts
add-ons.description: Subscribe to and play podcasts, plus publish your own podcast episodes as blog posts with iTunes-compatible RSS
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Includes both a podcast player (subscribe and listen) and a podcast publisher (create episodes as blog posts). Tables are self-initialized on first use.

add-ons.name: RoMM
add-ons.description: Retro game library and emulator — browse, organize, and play retro games in the browser
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: ROMM_LIBRARY_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path containing your ROM files (organized by system)

env_vars.name: ROMM_AUTH_SECRET_KEY
env_vars.description: Session secret key for RoMM authentication

add-ons.notes: Organize ROMs into system subdirectories (gba/, snes/, n64/, etc.). IGDB credentials (free) enable automatic cover art and metadata.

add-ons.name: SDXL Background Generator
add-ons.description: AI-generated backgrounds for the companion avatar using SDXL Turbo. Requires NVIDIA GPU.
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Requires nvidia-container-toolkit. Models (~25GB) download on first start. Used by companion and storage server's crow_generate_background tool.

add-ons.name: Songbook
add-ons.description: Personal chord book — ChordPro charts, transposition, chord diagrams, setlists, audio, and peer sharing
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Songs are blog posts tagged 'songbook' with ChordPro content. Installs a Songbook panel and AI skill.

add-ons.name: Tailscale
add-ons.description: Private network access — reach Crow from any device on your Tailnet
add-ons.author: Crow

add-ons.name: Tax Filing Assistant
add-ons.description: Prepare federal income taxes — document collection, calculation, PDF generation, and guided filing
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: CROW_TAX_ENCRYPTION_KEY
env_vars.description: Passphrase for encrypting PII at rest

add-ons.notes: Federal returns only — no state. 17 MCP tools including document ingestion (PDF reader). 2024 + 2025 tax years. Generates filled IRS PDFs. PII encrypted at rest. Not a substitute for professional tax advice.

add-ons.name: TriliumNext
add-ons.description: Personal knowledge base — search notes, manage note trees, clip web content, AI-powered organization via ETAPI
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: TRILIUM_DATA_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path for TriliumNext data (Docker mode)

add-ons.notes: Self-host via Docker or connect to existing. Get ETAPI token from Options > ETAPI in TriliumNext. 11 MCP tools for note management.

add-ons.name: vLLM Embeddings (Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B)
add-ons.description: Multilingual text embeddings (Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B, 1024-dim Matryoshka). Powers semantic search across memory, research notes, and blog. CUDA only.
add-ons.author: Crow

providers.description: Text embeddings via Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B (grackle, always warm)

add-ons.notes: Always-warm. Pairs with vllm-cuda-rerank. Steady-state ~1.6GB VRAM.

add-ons.name: vLLM Reranker (Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B)
add-ons.description: Cross-encoder reranker for hybrid FTS+vector retrieval. Multilingual, instruction-aware. CUDA only.
add-ons.author: Crow

providers.description: Cross-encoder reranking via Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B (grackle, always warm)

add-ons.notes: Always-warm. Use after embeddings retrieval to reorder top-K. Steady-state ~1.6GB VRAM.

add-ons.name: vLLM Vision (Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct-FP8)
add-ons.description: Vision-language model: image understanding, OCR, structured output. FP8 on Blackwell. CUDA only, on-demand.
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: On-demand. Mutex with embed/rerank during burst (vision unloads them temporarily). ~11GB VRAM peak. Requires vLLM >=0.11.0 + Blackwell or newer for FP8 e4m3.

add-ons.name: vLLM Kimi-Linear-48B (ROCm gfx1151, tiered Mode B)
add-ons.description: Top-tier long-context planner (Kimi-Linear-48B-A3B-Instruct, MoE, 1M context, BF16). Tiered: stops Qwen3-4B + GLM-4.7-Flash when activated. Manual start via crow-mode-big.
add-ons.author: Crow

add-ons.name: vLLM Qwen3-4B (ROCm gfx1151)
add-ons.description: Fast tool-dispatch LLM (Qwen3-4B BF16) served via vLLM on AMD Strix Halo (gfx1151). Part of crow's tiered Mode A.
add-ons.author: Crow

add-ons.name: vLLM Qwen3-32B (ROCm gfx1151)
add-ons.description: Mid-tier reasoning/synthesis LLM (Qwen3-32B dense 32B BF16) on AMD Strix Halo. Replaces GLM-4.7-Flash slot (incompatible architecture). Part of crow's tiered Mode A.
add-ons.author: Crow

add-ons.name: vLLM Qwen3.5-27B (ROCm gfx1151)
add-ons.description: Phase 3 daily-driver upgrade — Qwen3.5-27B BF16 (Feb 2026 release, ~54GB resident vs 64GB for Qwen3-32B). Served via vLLM-ROCm on AMD Strix Halo (gfx1151). Initially deployed on staging port :8012 alongside legacy :8002 (Qwen3-32B); flip via models.json baseUrl, then retire :8002. Automatic rollback on 4 thresholds per plan §3c.
add-ons.author: Crow

add-ons.name: vLLM Qwen3.5-4B (ROCm gfx1151)
add-ons.description: Phase 3 dispatch upgrade — Qwen3.5-4B BF16 (Mar 2026 release, 97.5% multi-tool pass). Served via vLLM-ROCm on AMD Strix Halo (gfx1151). Initially deployed on staging port :8011 alongside the legacy :8001 (Qwen3-4B) for Maker Lab cutover; flip via Maker Lab MCP env var update, then retire :8001.
add-ons.author: Crow

providers.description: Fast tool-dispatch + Maker Lab classroom endpoint (Qwen3.5-4B BF16)
